patterns_recognized: Carry thesis with near-zero bullpen gap + large f5_full_delta is 0-for-3 (6/1, 6/3, 6/4): when |hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap| < 0.020 AND f5_full_delta >= 0.15, the pen cannot bridge the F5 deficit — SKIP confirmed on any already-SKIP pick matching this profile.

HARD CAP 1 is non-negotiable at genuine negative edges (6/4 TOR@ATL lesson): never upgrade a CAP 1-demoted pick above its post-cap grade; sole exception is |edge_pp| < 4pp + pre-cap A- + 3 independent confirming signals (6/1 rescue rule).

BvP triple-OWNER cluster in top-3 batting order (2+ OWNERs) is the strongest same-day confirming signal: ATL has exceptional cluster vs Keller today (Acuna 3HR/21PA, Olson, Dubon all OWNER) but HARD CAP 1 at -4.31pp blocks rescue per 6/4 ruling.
D-grade dual-signal-against is directionally unreliable, not anti-directional: 6/3 confirmed 2-2 split; treat as SKIP with no anti-directional inference — do not OVERRIDE to the other side.
